title: Analyzing a Multi-Agent Run
concept: Tracing a task (like building a feature) across planning, coding, and review agents.

exercises.prompt: What is an agent in AI?

options.text: A type of computer program that acts automatically

exercises.explain: An agent in AI is a type of computer program that can act on its own to complete tasks.

cards.title: What is an Analyzing a Multi-Agent Run?
cards.body: It's looking at how different AI agents work together to finish a task. This can include planning, coding, and reviewing.

cards.title: Definition of Multi-Agent Run
cards.body: A Multi-Agent Run involves multiple AI programs, or agents, working together to complete a specific task.

cards.title: Building a Team
cards.body: Think of agents like different people on a team. One person plans, another codes, and another reviews the work. They all need to communicate well!

cards.title: Example of a Multi-Agent Run
cards.body: Imagine one agent picks what features to build, another writes the code, and a third checks if it works well.

cards.title: Myth: Agents Work Alone
cards.body: Some people think AI agents work solo. In reality, they often rely on each other to succeed!

cards.title: Visualize the Process
cards.body: Look at how tasks pass between different agents in the project.

right.text: Writes the code for the task.

exercises.prompt: What is the role of a planning agent?

options.text: To create a blueprint for the task
To check the work for mistakes

exercises.explain: The planning agent's role is crucial as it lays down the steps and structure needed to complete the task.

exercises.prompt: True or False: All agents in a Multi-Agent Run perform the same tasks.
exercises.explain: This statement is false because different agents specialize in different tasks, like planning and reviewing.

exercises.prompt: In a Multi-Agent Run, the ___ agent creates a plan for the task.
exercises.sentence: In a Multi-Agent Run, the planning agent creates a plan for the task.
exercises.explain: The blank should be 'planning' because it directly matches the role of the agent mentioned in the sentence.

exercises.prompt: Which of these describes the coding agent in a Multi-Agent Run?

options.text: It designs the user interface for the task.
It writes code according to the plan created.
It reviews the final product for errors.

exercises.explain: The coding agent is responsible for translating the plan into actual code that can be executed.

exercises.prompt: Which order of agents is correct in a Multi-Agent Run?

options.text: Reviewing Agent -> Planning Agent -> Coding Agent
Planning Agent -> Coding Agent -> Reviewing Agent
Coding Agent -> Planning Agent -> Reviewing Agent
Planning Agent -> Reviewing Agent -> Coding Agent

exercises.explain: The correct order is Planning Agent first, then Coding Agent, followed by Reviewing Agent. This ensures tasks are organized properly.
